resources.string: One sign-up. Instant access to powerful fiat features. Your wallet stays private, and you can delete profile anytime.
Receive an account where you can move your crypto and use your card just like a regular bank account.
A virtual bank account inside your crypto wallet.
Use one verified identity to get simplified access to supported onramps and services.
By using service, you agree with provider %1$s and %2$s
